title: 4pcs Crochet Hooks Set Aluminum Knitting Needles Multicolor Crochet Needles Tool Kit with Ergonomic Grip Handle for DIY Knitting Crochet Handmade Beginners or Professionals (4 Sizes)
features: 🧶 Premium Materials - The crochet hooks set is made of aluminium alloy material, which has the advantages of smooth surface, no rust, stable and firm.

🧶 4 Sizes Crochet Hook set - Each of our aluminum knitting needles is engraved with a clearly visible size. The set contains 4 different sizes of knitting needles in sizes 2mm, 4mm, 6mm and 8mm, different sizes are suitable for their different uses.
🧶 Smooth Crochet Tip - Our multicolor crochet needles have a smooth point and deep crochet neck to hold the yarn in place and create even stitches to enhance your knitting experience.

🧶 Ergonomically Designed Handle - The ergonomic handle of crochet hook reduces hand and wrist pain. You can knit for a long time without hand pain or cramps. It is ideal gift for grandma, mum or knitting enthusiasts.

🧶 Wide Applications - These knitting needles can be used to crochet scarves, baskets, mittens or jumpers. You can utilize your imagination and creativity to crochet anything you like. This is a great choice for crochet lovers and beginners.
description: Product Description 4pcs Crochet Hooks Set Product Details Smooth Tip The crochet hooks are made of high quality aluminium, lightweight and durable, with a smooth tip that would not snag or split the yarn, allowing you to knit more smoothly. 4 Size The kit contains 4 different sizes of crochet hooks, different sizes for different gauges of yarn. You can use your imagination to create different knitted items. Easy Identify Sizes were marked in mm clearly marked on the crochet hooks. The bright colours also allow you to identify the size you need at a glance. Wide Application This crochet set is perfect for knitting blankets, scarves, hats, bags and other crafts. It is suitable for crochet beginners, professionals and anyone who loves crocheting. Perfect Gift A perfect gift for knitting enthusiast.
